area_description: Factuality and hallucination in LLMs are critical challenges for reliable AI systems. In addition to RAG approaches, there are mainly two bodies of work to improve factuality and suppress hallucination.

categories.name: Knowledge Internalization
categories.description: The model learns to generate factual answers by internalizing knowledge from the training data, through pre-training, post-training, and novel memory architectures.

sub_topics.name: Pre-training and Mid-training
sub_topics.description: Internalization through pre-training and mid-training by feeding good pre-train data. Studies where to store the knowledge and when is the best time to feed knowledge.

sub_topics.name: Post-training
sub_topics.description: Internalization through post-training. Fine-tuning can trigger more hallucinations, so post-training needs to be done carefully.

sub_topics.name: New Memory Architecture
sub_topics.description: Proposing new memory architecture for factual knowledge storage and retrieval, where knowledge is internalized in the model. Approaches include LoRA adaptor, memory layer, residual memory, etc.

categories.name: Hallucination Suppression
categories.description: The model learns to reduce hallucinated facts in the generation through internal parameter manipulation, fine-tuning, confidence-based methods, and verification.

sub_topics.name: Internal Parameters
sub_topics.description: Output the correct fact by leveraging internal parameters at different layers of the model with different attention mechanisms, or by reciting.

sub_topics.name: Fine-tuning
sub_topics.description: Output the correct fact by fine-tuning such that the model learns to choose the right token among its internal knowledge based on confidence.

sub_topics.name: Confidence-based Suppression
sub_topics.description: Suppress incorrect facts using confidence-based softening, select to abstain with low confidence, or explicitly state confidence. Confidence comes from internal parameters or is calibrated with fine-tuning through consistency and comparison with ground truths.

sub_topics.name: Verification
sub_topics.description: Suppress incorrect facts with verification using internal knowledge, removing hallucinations that cannot be verified.
